org_invites_select.name: org_invites_select
org_invites_select.using:
(select public.has_org_role("organization_invites"."organization_id", 'admin')) or (select public.is_platform_admin())
        or lower("organization_invites"."email") = lower(coalesce((select auth.jwt() ->> 'email'), ''))

org_members_insert.name: org_members_insert
org_members_insert.withCheck:
(select public.has_org_role("organization_members"."organization_id", 'admin'))
        or (
          "organization_members"."user_id" = (select auth.uid()) and "organization_members"."role" = 'owner'
          and exists (
            select 1 from organizations o
            where o.id = "organization_members"."organization_id" and o.created_by_user_id = (select auth.uid())
          )
          and not exists (
            select 1 from organization_members m where m.organization_id = "organization_members"."organization_id"
          )
        )
        or (
          "organization_members"."user_id" = (select auth.uid())
          and exists (
            select 1 from organization_invites i
            where i.organization_id = "organization_members"."organization_id"
              and lower(i.email) = lower(coalesce((select auth.jwt() ->> 'email'), ''))
              and i.expires_at > now()
              and i.accepted_by_user_id is null
          )
        )

profiles_select.name: profiles_select
profiles_select.using:
"profiles"."id" = (select auth.uid()) or (select public.is_platform_admin()) or exists (
        select 1 from organization_members m1
        join organization_members m2 on m2.organization_id = m1.organization_id
        where m1.user_id = (select auth.uid()) and m2.user_id = "profiles"."id"
      )

provider_availability_select.name: provider_availability_select
provider_availability_select.using: exists (select 1 from provider_profiles pp where pp.id = "provider_availability"."provider_profile_id")

provider_profile_types_select.name: provider_profile_types_select
provider_profile_types_select.using: exists (select 1 from provider_profiles pp where pp.id = "provider_profile_types"."provider_profile_id")

provider_services_select.name: provider_services_select
provider_services_select.using: exists (select 1 from provider_profiles pp where pp.id = "provider_services"."provider_profile_id")

credential_documents_select.name: credential_documents_select
credential_documents_select.using: exists (select 1 from provider_credentials pc where pc.id = "credential_documents"."provider_credential_id")

credential_documents_insert.name: credential_documents_insert
credential_documents_insert.withCheck:
exists (select 1 from provider_credentials pc
        where pc.id = "credential_documents"."provider_credential_id" and pc.provider_profile_id = (select public.my_provider_profile_id()))

credential_documents_delete.name: credential_documents_delete
credential_documents_delete.using:
exists (select 1 from provider_credentials pc
        where pc.id = "credential_documents"."provider_credential_id" and pc.provider_profile_id = (select public.my_provider_profile_id()))

applications_select.name: applications_select
applications_select.using:
"applications"."provider_profile_id" = (select public.my_provider_profile_id()) or (select public.is_platform_admin())
        or exists (select 1 from opportunities o where o.id = "applications"."opportunity_id"
             and (select public.is_org_member(o.organization_id)))

applications_insert.name: applications_insert
applications_insert.withCheck:
"applications"."provider_profile_id" = (select public.my_provider_profile_id())
        and exists (select 1 from opportunities o
              where o.id = "applications"."opportunity_id" and o.status = 'posted')

applications_update.name: applications_update
applications_update.using:
"applications"."provider_profile_id" = (select public.my_provider_profile_id()) or (select public.is_platform_admin())
        or exists (select 1 from opportunities o where o.id = "applications"."opportunity_id"
             and (select public.has_org_role(o.organization_id, 'poster')))
applications_update.withCheck:
"applications"."provider_profile_id" = (select public.my_provider_profile_id()) or (select public.is_platform_admin())
        or exists (select 1 from opportunities o where o.id = "applications"."opportunity_id"
             and (select public.has_org_role(o.organization_id, 'poster')))

booking_occurrences_select.name: booking_occurrences_select
booking_occurrences_select.using: exists (select 1 from bookings b where b.id = "booking_occurrences"."booking_id")

booking_occurrences_write.name: booking_occurrences_write
booking_occurrences_write.using:
exists (select 1 from bookings b where b.id = "booking_occurrences"."booking_id"
        and (b.provider_profile_id = (select public.my_provider_profile_id())
             or (select public.has_org_role(b.organization_id, 'poster'))))
booking_occurrences_write.withCheck:
exists (select 1 from bookings b where b.id = "booking_occurrences"."booking_id"
        and (b.provider_profile_id = (select public.my_provider_profile_id())
             or (select public.has_org_role(b.organization_id, 'poster'))))

completion_records_select.name: completion_records_select
completion_records_select.using: exists (select 1 from bookings b where b.id = "completion_records"."booking_id")

completion_records_insert.name: completion_records_insert
completion_records_insert.withCheck:
exists (select 1 from bookings b where b.id = "completion_records"."booking_id"
        and (select public.has_org_role(b.organization_id, 'poster')))

completion_records_update.name: completion_records_update
completion_records_update.using:
exists (select 1 from bookings b where b.id = "completion_records"."booking_id"
        and (b.provider_profile_id = (select public.my_provider_profile_id())
             or (select public.has_org_role(b.organization_id, 'poster')))) or (select public.is_platform_admin())
completion_records_update.withCheck:
exists (select 1 from bookings b where b.id = "completion_records"."booking_id"
        and (b.provider_profile_id = (select public.my_provider_profile_id())
             or (select public.has_org_role(b.organization_id, 'poster')))) or (select public.is_platform_admin())

opportunity_occurrences_select.name: opportunity_occurrences_select
opportunity_occurrences_select.using: exists (select 1 from opportunities o where o.id = "opportunity_occurrences"."opportunity_id")

opportunity_occurrences_write.name: opportunity_occurrences_write
opportunity_occurrences_write.using:
exists (select 1 from opportunities o where o.id = "opportunity_occurrences"."opportunity_id"
        and (select public.has_org_role(o.organization_id, 'poster')))
opportunity_occurrences_write.withCheck:

        and (select public.has_org_role(o.organization_id, 'poster')))

opportunity_services_select.using: exists (select 1 from opportunities o where o.id = "opportunity_services"."opportunity_id")

        and (select public.has_org_role(o.organization_id, 'poster')))

messages_insert.name: messages_insert
messages_insert.withCheck:
"messages"."sender_user_id" = (select auth.uid())
        and (select public.is_thread_participant("messages"."thread_id"))
        and exists (select 1 from threads t where t.id = "messages"."thread_id" and t.locked_at is null)

thread_participants_select.name: thread_participants_select
thread_participants_select.using: exists (select 1 from threads t where t.id = "thread_participants"."thread_id")

thread_participants_insert_self.name: thread_participants_insert_self
thread_participants_insert_self.withCheck:
"thread_participants"."user_id" = (select auth.uid())
        and exists (select 1 from threads t where t.id = "thread_participants"."thread_id")

notification_deliveries_select.name: notification_deliveries_select
notification_deliveries_select.using: exists (select 1 from notifications n where n.id = "notification_deliveries"."notification_id") or (select public.is_platform_admin())
